message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_23-32-48_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: customer with 2 years returns 95 G
Expected: 95 (100 base + 10 first-insurance - 20 loyalty + 5 fee)
Current error: 115 vs 95
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_23-32-48_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts

If customer.yearsWithMHPCO >= 2, apply 20% loyalty discount to policy base premium (the sum of all item base premiums INCLUDING item-specific surcharges per the way "policy base premium" works). 

Actually let me clarify: the spec says "policy-wide modifiers (loyalty, first insurance, follow-up contract) apply to the policy base premium (the sum of all item base premiums)". And "item-specific modifiers (cursed, high enchantment) apply to the base premium of the affected item".

The natural reading is: policy base premium = sum of (item base + item surcharges). Loyalty is 20% of THAT.

For test 16 (cursed sword + amulet): 210 policy base + 16 first-insurance + 5 fee = 231 (passed). This used policy base = 100+50+60 = 210, no loyalty.

For this test (plain sword 2-year customer): policy base = 100. Loyalty = 20% of 100 = 20. + 10 first-insurance + 5 fee = 95.

Implementation: subtract policyBase * 0.2 if yearsWithMHPCO >= 2.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the failing test and implement the minimal change needed.

content.text:
All 17 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added loyalty discount calculation - if `customer.yearsWithMHPCO >= 2`, subtract 20% of `basePremium` from the total.
**Result**: All tests now pass (17 passing)
**Approach**: Minimal change - added a conditional `loyalty` variable computed as `basePremium * 0.2` when the loyalty condition holds, then subtracted it in the final return expression. No restructuring of existing logic.

Relevant file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_23-32-48_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts
